# Bastrop County Republican Party (BCRP)

> The Official Representatives for the Republican Party of Texas in Bastrop County

## Contact
- Office: 443 Highway 71 West, Bastrop, TX 78602
- Phone: 512.409.1415
- County Chair Phone: (512) 825-2707
- Hours: 10am-2pm Tues, Weds, Fri, Sat; 2pm-6pm Thurs
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BCRPBastropTX
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/BastropCtyGOP

## County Chair
Justin Bezner serves as Chairman of the Bastrop County Republican Party. He leads efforts to strengthen conservative values, promote civic engagement, and advance good governance across Bastrop County.

## Site Structure
- Home: https://bastropctygop.com/
- News: https://bastropctygop.com/news/
- Events: https://bastropctygop.com/events/
- County Chair: https://bastropctygop.com/about/county-chair/
- Leadership Team: https://bastropctygop.com/about/leadership/
- Precinct Chairs: https://bastropctygop.com/about/precinct-chairs/
- Precinct Chair FAQs: https://bastropctygop.com/about/precinct-chair-faqs/
- Bylaws: https://bastropctygop.com/about/bylaws/
- State GOP Leadership: https://bastropctygop.com/about/state-gop-leadership/
- Golf Classic: https://bastropctygop.com/events/golf-classic/
- Monthly Meetings: https://bastropctygop.com/events/monthly-meetings/
- Elected Officials: https://bastropctygop.com/resources/elected-officials/
- Donate: https://bastropctygop.wufoo.com/forms/zwcqdgs1ydkjyo/

## Purpose
The BCRP exists to promote Republican candidates, develop a county-wide organization, foster civic engagement, and encourage loyalty to the ideals of the Republican Party and conservative principles encompassed in the US Constitution and Texas Constitution.
